## Interface Contracts

```json
{
  "interfaces": [
    {
      "name": "Point2D",
      "kind": "struct",
      "language": "swift",
      "signature": "struct Point2D: Codable, Equatable, Hashable { var x: Double; var y: Double }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "Foundation-only, UmbraCore package"
    },
    {
      "name": "Size2D",
      "kind": "struct",
      "language": "swift",
      "signature": "struct Size2D: Codable, Equatable, Hashable { var width: Double; var height: Double }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "UmbraCore"
    },
    {
      "name": "Polygon",
      "kind": "struct",
      "language": "swift",
      "signature": "struct Polygon: Codable, Equatable { var points: [Point2D] }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "Ordered ring; used for target silhouette and derived shadow shapes. LOCKED: vector only, never a raster/UIImage \u2014 required for exact/epsilon geometry comparisons and VoiceOver position/rotation descriptions"
    },
    {
      "name": "OccluderShape",
      "kind": "enum",
      "language": "swift",
      "signature": "enum OccluderShape: Codable, Equatable { case rectangle }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "v1 has one case; future primitives add cases, never a schema rewrite"
    },
    {
      "name": "Occluder",
      "kind": "struct",
      "language": "swift",
      "signature": "struct Occluder: Codable, Equatable, Identifiable { let id: UUID; var shape: OccluderShape; var center: Point2D; var size: Size2D; var rotationDegrees: Double }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "UmbraCore"
    },
    {
      "name": "LightSource",
      "kind": "struct",
      "language": "swift",
      "signature": "struct LightSource: Codable, Equatable { var position: Point2D }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "Single point light per locked determinism decision"
    },
    {
      "name": "TargetSilhouette",
      "kind": "struct",
      "language": "swift",
      "signature": "struct TargetSilhouette: Codable, Equatable { var outline: Polygon }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "UmbraCore"
    },
    {
      "name": "Level",
      "kind": "struct",
      "language": "swift",
      "signature": "struct Level: Codable, Equatable, Identifiable { let id: UUID; var schemaVersion: Int; var title: String; var lightSource: LightSource; var occluders: [Occluder]; var target: TargetSilhouette; var createdAt: Date; var updatedAt: Date }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "The single canonical schema shared by Play, Edit, export, import, and the solve-checker. Value type \u2014 mutation always produces a new Level value, never in-place array mutation"
    },
    {
      "name": "LevelMutation",
      "kind": "enum",
      "language": "swift",
      "signature": "enum LevelMutation: Codable, Equatable { case moveOccluder(id: UUID, to: Point2D); case rotateOccluder(id: UUID, degrees: Double); case moveLight(to: Point2D); case duplicateOccluder(id: UUID); case deleteOccluder(id: UUID); case reset }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "LOCKED: the only input surface for level state changes; gestures, nudge-arrows, rotation-stepper, and replay/fuzz tests all construct these same cases"
    },
    {
      "name": "MatchState",
      "kind": "enum",
      "language": "swift",
      "signature": "enum MatchState: Codable, Equatable { case none; case close; case solved; static func classify(overlapFraction: Double) -> MatchState }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "Thresholds: close >= 0.970, solved >= 0.985, fixed deadband to avoid jitter flicker"
    },
    {
      "name": "SolveResult",
      "kind": "struct",
      "language": "swift",
      "signature": "struct SolveResult: Codable, Equatable { var overlapFraction: Double; var state: MatchState }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "Output of SolveEngine.solve(_:), never independently stored/driftable"
    },
    {
      "name": "SolveEngine",
      "kind": "protocol",
      "language": "swift",
      "signature": "enum SolveEngine { static func castShadowPolygon(light: LightSource, occluder: Occluder) -> Polygon; static func unionShadow(_ polygons: [Polygon]) -> Polygon; static func overlapFraction(shadow: Polygon, target: Polygon) -> Double; static func solve(_ level: Level) -> SolveResult }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "LOCKED: pure, synchronous, no async/Task. Overlap for a possibly-non-convex shadow union computed via fixed-resolution deterministic scanline quadrature (2048 horizontal strips, exact analytic per-strip trapezoid math over crossing edges) \u2014 not general polygon boolean ops, not sampling/Monte Carlo, not a third-party geometry library"
    },
    {
      "name": "LevelValidator",
      "kind": "function",
      "language": "swift",
      "signature": "enum LevelValidator { static func validate(_ level: Level) -> Result<Void, LevelValidationError> }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "Save-time gate; reuses SolveEngine plus checks for zero-area shadow, light-inside-occluder, unreachable target. Same function used by editor save and importer geometrically-invalid check"
    },
    {
      "name": "LevelValidationError",
      "kind": "enum",
      "language": "swift",
      "signature": "enum LevelValidationError: Error, Equatable { case unreachableTarget; case degenerateGeometry(reason: String); case lightInsideOccluder }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "Drives the inline 'why save is disabled' Edit state"
    },
    {
      "name": "LevelArtifactEnvelope",
      "kind": "struct",
      "language": "swift",
      "signature": "struct LevelArtifactEnvelope: Codable, Equatable { var schemaVersion: Int; var payload: Level }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "Encoded to base64url JSON string for ShareLink/paste"
    },
    {
      "name": "ImportFailure",
      "kind": "enum",
      "language": "swift",
      "signature": "enum ImportFailure: Error, Equatable { case truncatedOrMalformed; case unsupportedSchemaVersion(found: Int, supportedRange: ClosedRange<Int>); case geometricallyInvalid(reason: String) }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "Maps 1:1 to the three locked, visually-distinct import error states"
    },
    {
      "name": "ShareArtifactCoder",
      "kind": "function",
      "language": "swift",
      "signature": "enum ShareArtifactCoder { static func encode(_ level: Level) -> String; static func decode(_ artifactString: String) -> Result<Level, ImportFailure> }",
      "owning_lane": "services_utilities",
      "notes": "Single parser for Import screen and any future deep-link path. Decodes a locally-pasted/shared string only \u2014 no networking, no URLSession, no remote fetch anywhere in this app"
    },
    {
      "name": "VaultEntry",
      "kind": "struct",
      "language": "swift",
      "signature": "struct VaultEntry: Codable, Equatable, Identifiable { let id: UUID; var title: String; var solved: Bool; var starred: Bool; var bestOverlap: Double?; var updatedAt: Date; var targetPreview: Polygon }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "solved flag is recomputed/invalidated on load and on edit-geometry-change, never independently mutated. targetPreview is vector geometry, not a rendered image"
    },
    {
      "name": "VaultManifest",
      "kind": "struct",
      "language": "swift",
      "signature": "struct VaultManifest: Codable, Equatable { var schemaVersion: Int; var entries: [VaultEntry] }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "One manifest file; individual Level files loaded lazily on open"
    },
    {
      "name": "LevelStore",
      "kind": "protocol",
      "language": "swift",
      "signature": "protocol LevelStore { func loadManifest() throws -> VaultManifest; func loadLevel(id: UUID) throws -> Level; func saveLevel(_ level: Level) throws; func saveDraft(_ level: Level) throws; func loadDraft(for id: UUID) throws -> Level?; func clearDraft(for id: UUID) throws; func deleteLevel(id: UUID) throws; func importAsNewEntry(_ level: Level) throws -> VaultEntry }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "Cloud-ready seam; FileLevelStore is the only v1 conformance. importAsNewEntry always inserts, never overwrites on id collision. Synchronous, throwing \u2014 no async networking layer"
    },
    {
      "name": "FileLevelStore",
      "kind": "struct",
      "language": "swift",
      "signature": "final class FileLevelStore: LevelStore { init(baseDirectory: URL) }",
      "owning_lane": "services_utilities",

      "owning_lane": "primary_ui",
```
